_comment: Config for scripts/generate_founder_reveals — the Founder's name de-obfuscation as the Board falls (LORE_BIBLE 5: the sk static resolves to the player's own name as the four Board members are cleared). `name` is the full name under the static — the compiled preset shows name[0:visible] + obfuscated dummy chars, so the real letters never sit in the shipped file until their reveal stage. CONFIRM `name` matches the streamer's in-game display name before 1.0.0. `visible` = letters already readable in the base preset (villain_final_boss.json display_name, currently C + 3 obfuscated).
name: Cole
